description: A satellite program manager needs to select a launch provider to get their new satellite into orbit.

nodes.task_description: Define the satellite's requirements for launch, including its mass, volume, and target orbit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent lists all key launch requirements.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the capabilities, cost, and reliability of available launch providers (e.g., SpaceX, Arianespace, ULA).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a trade study comparing the different providers.

nodes.task_description: Select the best-value provider and begin contract negotiations.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent makes a data-driven recommendation and initiates the procurement process.
